nasb.text: But they forgot the Lord their God, so He sold them into the hand of Sisera, captain of the army of Hazor, and into the hand of the Philistines and into the hand of the king of Moab, and they fought against them.

esv.text: But they forgot the Lord their God. And he sold them into the hand of Sisera, commander of the army of Hazor,  and into the hand of the Philistines, and into the hand of the king of Moab. And they fought against them.

cnv.text: 他們卻忘記了耶和華他們的　神，　神就把他們交在夏瑣的將軍西西拉的手中，以及非利士人和摩押王的手中，於是這些人常常攻打他們。

ccb.text: 他们却忘记了他们的上帝耶和华，于是耶和华让他们落入夏琐的将军西西拉、非利士人和摩押王的手中，这些人常常攻击他们。
